# Wellington Mota — Product Engineer, Design + Front-end & AI Specialist

> Product Engineer with 15+ years in digital product design and 3+ years shipping front-end in modern stacks. Specializes in closing the gap between design and code — from UX research and high-fidelity prototypes to production React/TypeScript, with no handoff. AI Specialist focused on agent orchestration, prompt engineering, evals, and RAG integration.

Based in Brasília, Brazil. Open to remote opportunities worldwide. Fluent in English and Portuguese.

## Core Skills
- React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS
- Design Systems, UX Research, High-fidelity Prototyping (Figma)
- AI Engineering: Agent Orchestration (MCP), Prompt Engineering, Evals, RAG, Token Optimization
- REST/GraphQL API integration
- Performance optimization & accessibility (WCAG)

## Experience Highlights
- 15+ years in product design across Brazil, UK, and US
- 40% reduction in handoff time by owning both design and code
- 28% increase in feature adoption through data-driven iteration
- Delivered projects for Mitsubishi, ServiceNow, Mindtools, KIA Motors, Banco do Brasil, CAIXA, Wevr, and 20+ other brands

## Services
- [Product Design & UX](https://userexperience.com.br/#servicos): User research, wireframes, high-fidelity prototypes, usability testing
- [Design Systems](https://userexperience.com.br/#servicos): Tokens, component libraries, living documentation
- [Front-end Engineering](https://userexperience.com.br/#servicos): React/Next.js/TypeScript, REST/GraphQL integration, performance & accessibility
- [AI Engineering & Orchestration](https://userexperience.com.br/#servicos): Multi-agent pipelines (MCP), evals, RAG, token optimization
- [Rapid Prototyping (0→1)](https://userexperience.com.br/#servicos): MVP in days, concept to clickable, user validation

## Projects
- [Kia Telluride LX](https://userexperience.com.br/#projetos): Landing page — layout, UI, vehicle configuration experience
- [Wevr Virtual Studio](https://userexperience.com.br/#projetos): Interface and UX for VR production platform (US)
- [Autódromo Velocitta](https://userexperience.com.br/#projetos): Identity and digital presence for Brazilian racetrack
- [ArtCaffé](https://userexperience.com.br/#projetos): Visual direction and digital assets for Kenyan café chain
- [Odens](https://userexperience.com.br/#projetos): Brand identity and packaging design (UK)

## Writing
- [From UX/UI Design to Front-End Development](https://medium.com/@wellingtonmota/from-ux-ui-design-to-front-end-development-embracing-a-new-chapter-756f55de93df): Career transition after 15+ years in design
- [Hands-off UX/UI Documentation](https://medium.com/design-bootcamp/level-up-your-ux-ui-game-why-you-should-do-hands-off-documentation-like-this-6233def429ae): User stories, acceptance criteria, Given-When-Then scenarios
